name: Liliha Bakery
tagline: Coco puffs since 1950 — the green chiffon cake and butter rolls are the real insider order.
parking: Dedicated lot at the original Kuakini St location; Nimitz Hwy location has larger lot
talkStory: Founded 1950 by Takeo and Sumie Takakuwa. The Coco Puff — choux pastry filled with chocolate pudding, topped with Chantilly frosting — is arguably Hawaii's most iconic pastry.
insiderTips: Locals call it 'the puff' — say 'I brought puffs' and everyone on Oahu knows. Buy a box of 6 or 12 — it's the standard 'omiyage' (gift) when visiting a local's house. Go before 7am weekdays for fresh batches, zero line.
